---
name: "🎫 Registration / 参加登録"
---

## Registration / 参加登録

- **GitHub Username:** 
- **Preferred Role / 希望する役割:** [Presenter / Hacker / Both / Attendee]
- **Language / 言語:** [English / 日本語 / Both]

## Checklist

- [ ] Profile page added to `profiles/{username}/profile.md`
- [ ] Required sections completed (About Me, Introduction, What I'll Bring, Preferred Role)
- [ ] No email addresses — public/social contacts only
- [ ] Reviewed [Code of Conduct](../../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
